description_long: This is a small, stylized biplane with a vibrant blue and purple geometric pattern covering its fuselage and wings. The airplane features two stacked wings with yellow leading edges and struts connecting the upper and lower wings. The nose houses a single wooden propeller, and the cockpit is open with a single seat, positioned just behind the propeller. The landing gear consists of two large floats, indicating it is designed for water landings rather than traditional wheels. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all matching the main color scheme.
description: A colorful, stylized biplane with dual wings, an open cockpit, and float landing gear for water landings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cockpit, dual wings, and prominent float landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, stacked wings, and the width of the floats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the propeller, cockpit, and wing struts.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the propeller, open cockpit, and the alignment of the floats and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Float landing gear with two main floats, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the propeller.
